name: uploadMedia
label: Upload Media
description: Upload an image or video file to your Postora media library.

parameters.name: mediaUrl
parameters.label: Media URL
parameters.help: Publicly accessible URL of the file to upload. Provide either URL or Base64.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.label: Filename
parameters.help: Desired filename with extension (e.g. photo.jpg, video.mp4).

parameters.name: platforms
parameters.label: Target Platforms
parameters.help: Comma-separated platforms this media is intended for (e.g. instagram,facebook).
